# Elevent

> Elevent is a strategic corporate event organizer platform for enterprise companies in Indonesia. It operates a curated platform model — matching every event brief with the right specialist team — covering formats from gala dinners to hybrid conferences, for audiences of 100 to 5,000+ people.

Elevent designs corporate events the way a director designs a film: every decision is planned, every detail has a function, and the event is built to be remembered rather than forgotten by the following Monday. The company serves enterprise clients across Indonesia, with a primary base in Jakarta.

- Target market: enterprise companies, GA managers, corporate communications teams, and decision-makers responsible for company event calendars in Indonesia.
- Languages: Indonesian (primary) and English.
- Coverage cities: Jakarta, Bali, Surabaya, Bandung, Medan, Makassar.

## Services

- [Corporate Event](https://elevent.id/services/corporate-event): End-to-end planning and execution for enterprise corporate events.
- [Corporate Gathering](https://elevent.id/services/corporate-gathering): Annual gatherings, town halls, and internal company events.
- [Product Launching](https://elevent.id/services/product-launching): Launch events designed around business objectives and brand impact.
- [Gala Dinner & Award Night](https://elevent.id/services/gala-dinner-award-night): Exclusive gala dinners and awarding ceremonies.
- [Conference & Seminar](https://elevent.id/services/conference-seminar): Conferences, seminars, and large-format knowledge events.
- [Team Building](https://elevent.id/services/team-building): Team building programs for corporate teams.
- [MICE & Hospitality](https://elevent.id/services/mice-hospitality): Meetings, incentives, conferences, and exhibitions with hospitality management.
- [Hybrid & Virtual Event](https://elevent.id/services/hybrid-virtual-event): Hybrid and fully virtual corporate event production.
- [Incentive Trip](https://elevent.id/services/incentive-trip): Incentive travel programs for enterprise clients.
- [Corporate Meeting](https://elevent.id/services/corporate-meeting): Corporate meetings and management offsites.
- [Corporate Anniversary](https://elevent.id/services/corporate-anniversary): Company anniversary celebrations and milestone events.
- [Corporate Outing](https://elevent.id/services/corporate-outing): Corporate outings and recreational team programs.
- [Brand Activation](https://elevent.id/services/brand-activation): Brand activation campaigns and experiential marketing events.
- [Exhibition & Pameran](https://elevent.id/services/exhibition-pameran): Exhibitions, trade shows, and pameran.
- [Roadshow](https://elevent.id/services/roadshow): Multi-city roadshows and travelling brand events.
- [Corporate Event Organizer](https://elevent.id/services/corporate-event-organizer): General corporate event organizing services.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://elevent.id): Company overview and approach.
- [Services](https://elevent.id/services): Full catalogue of corporate event formats.
- [Our Work](https://elevent.id/work): Case studies from enterprise events across Indonesia.
- [Insights](https://elevent.id/insights): Guides and analysis on corporate event planning.
- [About](https://elevent.id/about): The platform model and company philosophy.
- [Contact](https://elevent.id/contact): Direct contact and office details.
- [Get a Proposal](https://elevent.id/get-a-proposal): Submit an event brief for a proposal.
